meta.title: Computer Engineering Complete Curriculum
meta.description: All domains, subjects, chapters, sub-topics and concepts for a Computer Engineering degree and beyond

subtopics.name: Double pointers
concepts: use in modifying pointer in function

subtopics.name: Stack vs Heap
concepts: memory layout of a C program

subtopics.name: Collision resolution
concepts: open addressing (linear probing, quadratic probing, double hashing)

subtopics.name: Sorting analysis
concepts: O(n log n) lower bound proof

subtopics.name: Instruction formats
concepts: addressing modes (immediate, direct, indirect, register, indexed, relative)

subtopics.name: Virtual memory
concepts: page replacement algorithms (FIFO, LRU, Optimal, Clock)

subtopics.name: VLSI design flow
concepts: specification → RTL → synthesis → floorplanning → placement → routing → DRC/LVS → tapeout

subtopics.name: System calls
concepts: system call types (process, file, device, info, communication)

subtopics.name: Processes
concepts: process states (new, ready, running, waiting, terminated)

subtopics.name: CPU Scheduling
concepts: scheduling criteria (CPU utilization, throughput, turnaround, waiting, response time)

subtopics.name: Deadlocks
concepts: conditions for deadlock (mutual exclusion, hold and wait, no preemption, circular wait)

subtopics.name: File system navigation
concepts: ls, cd, pwd, find, locate, du, df

subtopics.name: Text processing
concepts: grep, sed, awk, cut, sort, uniq, wc, tr

subtopics.name: Process management
concepts: ps, top, htop, kill, nice, nohup, jobs, fg, bg

subtopics.name: Networking CLI
concepts: ip, ifconfig, netstat, ss, ping, traceroute, curl, wget, nmap, tcpdump, iptables

subtopics.name: Hypervisors
concepts: Type 1 (bare-metal): VMware ESXi, Microsoft Hyper-V, Xen, KVM

subtopics.name: Containerization
concepts: namespaces (PID, net, mnt, uts, ipc, user)

subtopics.name: TCP
concepts: congestion control (slow start, AIMD, CUBIC, BBR)

subtopics.name: DNS
concepts: DNS record types (A, AAAA, MX, CNAME, TXT, NS, SOA, PTR)

subtopics.name: SDN
concepts: control plane vs data plane separation

subtopics.name: DDL
concepts: constraints (PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, UNIQUE, NOT NULL, CHECK, DEFAULT)

subtopics.name: Queries
concepts: joins (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL, CROSS, SELF)
window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD, SUM OVER, PARTITION BY)

subtopics.name: Query execution
concepts: join algorithms (nested loop, sort-merge, hash join)

subtopics.name: Key-value stores
concepts: Redis data structures (string, hash, list, set, sorted set, stream)

subtopics.name: Graph databases
concepts: use cases (social networks, recommendation engines, fraud detection)

subtopics.name: Waterfall
concepts: phases (requirement, design, implementation, testing, deployment, maintenance)

subtopics.name: Reductions
concepts: common NP-complete problems (3-SAT, vertex cover, clique, subset sum, traveling salesman)

subtopics.name: React
concepts: hooks (useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, useMemo, useCallback, useRef)

subtopics.name: Probability
concepts: probability distributions (Bernoulli, Binomial, Poisson, Normal, Exponential, Uniform)

subtopics.name: Inferential statistics
concepts: Type I and Type II errors

subtopics.name: Model evaluation
concepts: metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, MSE, RMSE, MAE, R²)

subtopics.name: Perceptron and MLP
concepts: activation functions (ReLU, sigmoid, tanh, GELU, Swish, Leaky ReLU)

subtopics.name: Optimization
concepts: learning rate scheduling (step decay, cosine annealing, warmup)

subtopics.name: LSTM and GRU
concepts: LSTM gates (input, forget, output, cell state)

subtopics.name: Fine-tuning LLMs
concepts: PEFT (LoRA, QLoRA, prefix tuning, prompt tuning, adapter tuning)

subtopics.name: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
concepts: vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, Qdrant, pgvector)

subtopics.name: Block ciphers
concepts: block cipher modes (ECB, CBC, CTR, GCM, CCM)

subtopics.name: Key distribution problem
concepts: key derivation functions (PBKDF2, bcrypt, Argon2, scrypt)

subtopics.name: CTF and labs
concepts: CTF categories (pwn, web, crypto, forensics, reverse engineering, misc)

subtopics.name: Storage
concepts: S3 (buckets, storage classes, lifecycle, presigned URLs)

subtopics.name: Networking
concepts: VPC (subnets, route tables, IGW, NAT gateway, security groups, NACLs)

subtopics.name: Load balancing
concepts: algorithms (round robin, least connections, IP hash, weighted)

subtopics.name: Consistency models
concepts: session guarantees (read your writes, monotonic reads)

subtopics.name: Wired protocols
concepts: SPI (CPOL, CPHA, CS, MOSI, MISO, CLK)

subtopics.name: PQC
concepts: threat to RSA/ECC from Shor's algorithm
